spec_match.rationale: Directly aligns with local subnet CSRF protection specifications.

interactive.rationale: Allows users to toggle legacy vs enforcing mode, initiating a simulated attack that logs output incrementally.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Excellent explanation of CSRF against loopback CVE classes.

edge_cases.rationale: Explicitly describes default router auth scenarios and side-channel threats.

design_system.rationale: Highly visible red/green badges indicating hijacked vs blocked states.

summary: An incredible threat model walkthrough showing how PNA blocks unauthenticated LAN routing attacks.
